query:
SELECT l.id, l.userId, u.name, l.digestType, l.sentDate, l.weekKey, l.status, l.itemCount, l.dryRun, l.error, l.sentAt
FROM userEmailSendLog l
JOIN users u ON u.id = l.userId
WHERE u.name = 'Ryan Pemberton'
ORDER BY l.sentAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
